---
title: "AMS 597 Project"
date: 2026-03-05
author: Shane Patandin, Matthew Tranquada, Vraj Patel, Kaushal Patel, Sur Vaghasiya
output: pdf_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
library(reticulate) # allows us to use Python in .Rmd file
# reticulate::virtualenv_create("597_env") # only need to create once
use_virtualenv("597_env", required = TRUE) # specifying which venv for python libs
```

# R Code

``` {r}
# data = read.csv("./US_Accidents_March23.csv")
# head(data)
```


# Python Code

```{python}
import pandas as pd
import numpy as np
import torch
```

```{python}
df = pd.read_csv("./US_Accidents_March23.csv")
df.head()
```
